seo.title: Scooty DO — Smart Electric Scooters for Urban Mobility
seo.description: Explore Scooty DO electric scooters built for fast, stylish, and eco-friendly urban commuting. Discover powerful performance, sleek design, and city-ready convenience.

navigation.announcement: 188 scooters in stock • Fast city delivery • Admin-ready content architecture

hero.eyebrow: Modern electric mobility for ambitious city riders
hero.title: Move smarter.
hero.description: Scooty DO delivers fast, foldable, stylish electric scooters designed for students, commuters, delivery riders, and anyone who wants a premium city ride without fuel costs.

floatingCards.title: Long battery life
floatingCards.description: Reliable power for daily city routes and multiple short trips.

floatingCards.title: Foldable design
floatingCards.description: Portable enough for apartments, offices, and public transit transitions.

features.title: Built for speed, comfort, and everyday city convenience
features.description: Every model is designed around practical performance: long battery life, durable body construction, safe handling, and a lightweight structure that fits modern urban living.

items.title: High-speed urban performance
items.description: Fast and smooth acceleration helps riders save time on short-distance city travel.

items.title: Long-lasting battery
items.description: Ride longer with dependable battery efficiency designed for daily commuting.

items.title: Lightweight foldable frame
items.description: Carry it easily upstairs, into apartments, classrooms, elevators, or office spaces.

items.title: Durable body design
items.description: Strong construction supports up to 100 KG while staying sleek and modern.

products.title: Choose the scooter that fits your city lifestyle
products.description: Structured for easy future CMS updates: prices, stock, images, specs, and calls to action can all be changed without editing components.

inventoryHighlight.title: 188 total scooters ready for immediate dispatch
inventoryHighlight.description: Use this section later for dynamic inventory sync from Firebase, Supabase, or MongoDB. Perfect for scarcity, flash sales, and restock campaigns.

testimonials.title: Trusted by students, commuters, and fast-moving city riders
testimonials.description: These reviews are structured to be editable from a future dashboard with names, quotes, roles, and highlight tags.

items.quote: Scooty DO made my daily commute way faster. It feels premium, saves me money, and folds easily when I get to campus.
items.name: Ava Rahman

items.quote: I needed a stylish but practical scooter for office travel. The ride feels stable, the battery lasts, and the design always gets attention.
items.name: Marcus Lee

items.quote: For short delivery routes and quick errands, this is a huge upgrade from spending on fuel. Smooth, fast, and easy to use.
items.name: Nadia Karim
